key_flags.message: Synthetic Private Fund Placeholder is an opaque/private placeholder and needs a human valuation policy.

data_coverage_result.summary: Coverage is mixed: 22 of 22 held positions have local fixture prices, 22 holdings have complete sector/theme classifications, and 1 item(s) need human review before production use.
data_coverage_result.workflow_emphasis: Detailed data coverage and valuation-confidence review is the primary workflow focus.

report_title: Northstar Family Office Synthetic Portfolio Review

advisor_talking_points: This data coverage review uses a first local valuation confidence rubric; it is transparent, deterministic, and deliberately limited.
The current public-security synthetic data is mostly clean by design; the private placeholder and Plaid mock path show where human review becomes visible.
Valuation confidence should distinguish source quality and freshness from investment forecasting.
Human review requirements should be visible before a portfolio is treated as report-ready.
caveats: The valuation-confidence prototype is local-only and rule-based.
No market-data vendor, statement extraction, or real custodian data is used.
Data coverage describes source readiness and does not forecast investment performance.
emphasized_report_sections: What This Demo Does Not Yet Prove
workflow_template.intended_audience: Advisor, analyst, or operations reviewer assessing valuation confidence and data readiness.
workflow_template.meeting_goal: Frame what the current demo can and cannot say about data coverage, valuation confidence, and human-review needs.
workflow_template.next_upgrade_path: Add stale-value, source-inventory, and reconciliation-specific checks without introducing live data or vendor dependencies.
primary_questions: Which data fields are cleanly available in the current synthetic fixtures?
Which valuation-confidence dimensions are high, medium, low, or unknown under the local rules?
Where would real portfolios need source inventory, reconciliation, or human review?
suggested_follow_up_actions: Review the data_coverage_result.json artifact alongside the report package.
Decide which human-review items should become workflow tasks.
Extend the rubric only after source inventory and reconciliation boundaries are clearer.
